title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for calmer night feeds
subtitle: Warm milk by the bedside, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough? A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand. USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready. Warm milk poured out ready for the bottle — without leaving the room. Save this for your next night feed.

storyboard.visual: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
storyboard.subtitle_en: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：0-12月新手爸妈、夜奶家庭；场景：夜间卧室喂奶（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热；进液来源仅限：储奶袋（母乳储存袋）或家里日常使用的婴儿奶瓶倒奶；禁止出现：市售牛奶塑料瓶、鲜奶纸盒/利乐包、酸奶杯、任意商超乳制品包装；结构严格对照产品参考图：顶部为翻盖式铰链盖（侧面浅紫矩形按键弹开），非螺旋旋盖；倒出口为盖面碗形凹槽内的小圆孔出液嘴，倾斜杯身时暖奶从此圆孔流出；进液经翻开顶盖倒入杯内腔体；盖下深紫装饰环 nurture wise 标识；下段竖向数显屏（°F 温度）及图标；数显旁椭圆形 recessed 电源键；底部 recessed 充电口（硅胶盖内，非杯身侧面 USB 口）；禁止画成：圆顶旋盖、宽口直倒、杯身侧面充电口、奶瓶放入杯内；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?

Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand.

A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand.
USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready.

Save this for your next night feed.

seedance_prompts: Hook opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?

Problem moment, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, frustrated with cold milk in baby bottle, bulky old bottle warmer in background, moody lighting, realistic hand physics, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand.

Product demo, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, side angle — flip-top lid open, pour milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo, tilt to pour warm milk OUT from lid spout into baby feeding bottle, realistic pour physics, vertical display visible, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready.

Proof detail, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, macro shot of warm milk pouring OUT from lid spout of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo into baby feeding bottle, hinged lid open, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Warm milk poured out ready for the bottle — without leaving the room.

CTA closing, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, smiling to camera with portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo and baby bottle on clean surface, flip-top lid closed, digital display visible, natural gesture, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference.
